title: ChatGPT Workspace Agents Arrive for Business Teams
desc: OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Workspace Agents to Business plans: build agents for repeatable tasks across Slack, Drive, and more. Free through July 6, 2026.
keywords: chatgpt workspace agents, chatgpt business, ai agents for business, workflow automation, ai agents slack, custom gpts successor, ai automation agency
cta: Want a business agent built around your stack?
body:
June 22, 2026. OpenAI is pushing ChatGPT past chat and into doing the work. ChatGPT Workspace Agents, positioned as the successor to custom GPTs, are rolling out to ChatGPT Business workspaces, letting a team build agents that run repeatable tasks across the apps it already uses. Details are on OpenAI's announcement, and the enterprise and business rollout was covered by VentureBeat.

What shipped

  1. Workspace Agents let a team build agents for repeatable tasks that act across connected apps such as Google Drive, Google Calendar, Slack, SharePoint, and Salesforce, not just answer questions.
  2. Agents can run inside ChatGPT and inside Slack. A ChatGPT Agents app lets you deploy an agent to a Slack channel, where it can respond to your team, perform tasks through its connections, and return files.
  3. OpenAI frames this as the successor to custom GPTs, a shift from a chatbot you configure to an agent that takes action.
  4. The rollout to Business is gradual over the coming weeks. The free period runs through July 6, 2026, after which credit based pricing begins.

What it means for operators

The build a small agent for one repeatable task pattern is now available right where small teams already work, in chat and in Slack. Strong first targets are narrow and measurable: triage inbound messages, draft follow ups from your CRM, compile a weekly status report from a few sources, or answer internal questions from your own documents. These are the same jobs we automate every day in our AI automation and lead generation work.

Two cautions keep a pilot from stalling. First, scope tightly. Industry data through 2026 shows most agent pilots never reach production, almost always because they were aimed at a fuzzy, sprawling task. Connect only the apps the job needs, and keep a human approving anything irreversible. Second, use the clock. The free window through July 6 is a chance to prove value before credit based pricing starts, so measure the time saved per run from day one. A demonstrated task, captured with this week's record and replay tools, is a natural thing to hand a workspace agent to run on repeat. If you want it built and governed properly, that is what our AI automation agency does.
faqs: They are agents a team builds inside ChatGPT to run repeatable tasks across connected apps like Google Drive, Calendar, Slack, SharePoint, and Salesforce. OpenAI describes them as the successor to custom GPTs, designed to take action rather than only answer questions, and they can run in ChatGPT or in Slack.
Can a small team use them or is this enterprise only?

They are rolling out to ChatGPT Business workspaces, not just large enterprises, over the coming weeks. That puts agent building within reach of small teams that already pay for ChatGPT Business, though availability is gradual.
What should we automate with a workspace agent first?

Pick one narrow, measurable task: triage inbound messages, draft follow ups from your CRM, compile a weekly report, or answer internal questions from your documents. Connect only the apps that task needs and keep a human approving anything irreversible.
What will ChatGPT Workspace Agents cost?
The free period runs through July 6, 2026, after which credit based pricing begins. Use the free window to pilot and measure time saved per run, so you can judge the value before paid usage starts.
